title: 7 Emerging Trends in Dog Training You Need to Know for 2025
raw_text: 2025 trends article: positive reinforcement is gold standard; AI-powered training apps becoming common. Dopamine-based reward learning. Reward-based methods non-negotiable. Dogs trained solely with rewards show reduced aggression and anxiety vs punishment methods. Applied Animal Behaviour Science research cited: positive reinforcement dogs learn faster and form stronger bonds. Customized training plans with AI analysis of dog responses in real-time.

metadata.notes: Professional training blog; curates 2025 trends; credibility moderate
